org.arakhne.neteditor.io

Interface NetEditorReader

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractGMLReader, AbstractGraphMLReader, AbstractGXLReader, AbstractNetEditorReader, AbstractXMLReader, AbstractXMLToolReader, GMLReader, GMLReader1, GMLReader2, GraphMLReader, GraphMLReader1, GraphMLReader2, GXLReader, GXLReader1, GXLReader2, NGRReader

    public interface NetEditorReader
    This interface represents a reader of NetEditor files.
    Since:
    16.0
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      NetEditorContentType getContentType()
      Replies the type of the last read content by this reader.
      Progression getProgression()
      Replies the task progression model used by this reader.
      String getReaderVersion()
      Replies the version of the reader.
      ResourceRepository getResourceRepository()
      Replies the resource repository used by this writer.
      <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> 
      G      		 read(Class<G> type, File inputFile, Map<UUID,List<ViewComponent>> figures)
      Read the specified input stream as a XML file, and extract a graph model and its associated figures.
      <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> 
      G      		 read(Class<G> type, InputStream is, Map<UUID,List<ViewComponent>> figures)
      Read the specified input stream as a GXL file, and extract a graph model and its associated figures.
      <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> 
      G      		 read(Class<G> type, URL inputURL, Map<UUID,List<ViewComponent>> figures)
      Read the specified input stream as a XML file, and extract a graph model and its associated figures.
      void setProgression(Progression model)
      Set the task progression model used by this reader.
      void setResourceRepository(ResourceRepository repos)
      Replies the resource repository used by this writer.

    • Method Detail

      • getProgression

        Progression getProgression()
        Replies the task progression model used by this reader.
        Returns:
        the task progression model.

      • setProgression

        void setProgression(Progression model)
        Set the task progression model used by this reader.
        Parameters:
        model - is the task progression model.

      • getReaderVersion

        String getReaderVersion()
        Replies the version of the reader.
        Returns:
        the version of the reader.

      • getContentType

        NetEditorContentType getContentType()
        Replies the type of the last read content by this reader.
        Returns:
        the type, or null if unknown.

      • read

        <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> G read(Class<G> type,
                                File inputFile,
                                Map<UUID,List<ViewComponent>> figures)
                              throws IOException
        Read the specified input stream as a XML file, and extract a graph model and its associated figures.
        Type Parameters:
        G - is the expected type of the graph to read from the stream.
        Parameters:
        type - is the expected type of the graph to read from the stream.
        inputFile - is the file to read.
        figures - is the collection of figures that were read from the input stream, from the front to the background.
        Returns:
        the graph read from the input stream.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • read

        <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> G read(Class<G> type,
                                URL inputURL,
                                Map<UUID,List<ViewComponent>> figures)
                              throws IOException
        Read the specified input stream as a XML file, and extract a graph model and its associated figures.
        Type Parameters:
        G - is the expected type of the graph to read from the stream.
        Parameters:
        type - is the expected type of the graph to read from the stream.
        inputURL - is the URL to read.
        figures - is the collection of figures that were read from the input stream, from the front to the background.
        Returns:
        the graph read from the input stream.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • read

        <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> G read(Class<G> type,
                                InputStream is,
                                Map<UUID,List<ViewComponent>> figures)
                              throws IOException
        Read the specified input stream as a GXL file, and extract a graph model and its associated figures.
        Type Parameters:
        G - is the expected type of the graph to read from the stream.
        Parameters:
        type - is the expected type of the graph to read from the stream.
        is - is the input stream.
        figures - is the collection of figures that were read from the input stream, from the front to the background.
        Returns:
        the graph read from the input stream.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • getResourceRepository

        ResourceRepository getResourceRepository()
        Replies the resource repository used by this writer.
        Returns:
        the resource repository.

      • setResourceRepository

        void setResourceRepository(ResourceRepository repos)
        Replies the resource repository used by this writer.
        Parameters:
        repos - the resource repository.
